root: ^The line to Laï is a great success and as thus had been expended!
^Commercial contract with Laï have been paused, politics stuff don't worry about that
^Trains will continue to leave the stations of Ariëta and Esïe, and Sörena will continue to receive trains
^However Laï will now both receive and send trains!
^Be careful at the station's timer before sending one to ensure no collission happen!
